    select
        ao1_0.id,
        ao1_0.created_at,
        ao1_0.is_deleted,
        ao1_0.direction,
        ao1_0.matched_at,
        ao1_0.matched_quantity,
        ao1_0.order_no,
        ao1_0.price,
        ao1_0.quantity,
        ao1_0.settlement_price,

        ao1_0.updated_at,
        ao1_0.user_id 
    from
        auction_order ao1_0 
    where
        ao1_0.direction=? 
        and ao1_0.status in (?) 
        and not(ao1_0.is_deleted) 
    order by
        ao1_0.price desc

        cr1_0.accounting_period,
        cr1_0.attachments,
        cr1_0.blockchain_tx_hash,
        cr1_0.calculation_method,
        cr1_0.created_at,
        cr1_0.is_deleted,
        cr1_0.emission_data,
        cr1_0.enterprise_id,
        cr1_0.on_chain_at,
        cr1_0.report_no,
        cr1_0.report_type,
        cr1_0.review_comment,
        cr1_0.reviewed_at,
        cr1_0.reviewer_id,
        cr1_0.scope1_emission,
        cr1_0.scope2_emission,
        cr1_0.scope3_emission,
        cr1_0.signature_data,
        cr1_0.status,
        cr1_0.submitter_id,
        cr1_0.title,
        cr1_0.total_emission,
        cr1_0.updated_at 
    from
        carbon_report cr1_0 
    where
        cr1_0.is_deleted=false 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or cr1_0.enterprise_id=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or cr1_0.status=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or cr1_0.title like ? escape '' 
            or cr1_0.report_no like ? escape ''
        ) 
    offset
        ? rows 
    fetch
        first ? rows only

        cr1_0.emission_data,
        cr1_0.enterprise_id,
        cr1_0.on_chain_at,
        cr1_0.report_no,
        cr1_0.report_type,
        cr1_0.review_comment,
        cr1_0.reviewed_at,
        cr1_0.reviewer_id,
        cr1_0.scope1_emission,
        cr1_0.scope2_emission,
        cr1_0.scope3_emission,
        cr1_0.signature_data,
        cr1_0.status,
        cr1_0.submitter_id,
        cr1_0.title,
        cr1_0.total_emission,
        cr1_0.updated_at 
    from
        carbon_report cr1_0 
    where
        cr1_0.is_deleted=false 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or cr1_0.enterprise_id=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or cr1_0.status=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or cr1_0.title like ? escape '' 
            or cr1_0.report_no like ? escape ''
        ) 
    offset
        ? rows 
    fetch
        first ? rows only
